query_title: The Worst Week of My Life

recommendations.title: 7 Women and a Murder
recommendations.overview: When the family patriarch is murdered, seven women find themselves trapped together in his mansion to solve the mystery.

recommendations.title: The Tearsmith
recommendations.overview: Adopted together after a tough childhood in an orphanage, Nica and Rigel realize that unexpected but irresistible feelings pull them together.

recommendations.title: When Mom Is Away
recommendations.overview: A stressed-out mom takes off on a 10-day solo vacation, sending her family into chaos as the dad tries to take over the household duties.

recommendations.title: Ma che bella sorpresa
recommendations.overview: High school professor Guido is a hopeless romantic whose life falls apart after his girlfriend leaves him. Paolo, a former student of his, helps him in getting out of his depression for a better chance to become a PE teacher himself.

recommendations.title: My Big Gay Italian Wedding

recommendations.title: Soap Opera

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in America
recommendations.overview: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan over thirty years later, where he once again must confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

recommendations.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
recommendations.overview: While the Civil War rages on between the Union and the Confederacy, three men – a quiet loner, a ruthless hitman, and a Mexican bandit – comb the American Southwest in search of a strongbox containing $200,000 in stolen gold.

recommendations.title: The Worst Christmas of My Life

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
recommendations.overview: As the railroad builders advance unstoppably through the Arizona desert on their way to the sea, Jill arrives in the small town of Flagstone with the intention of starting a new life.
